diagnosis_text: The access grant on 'Q3 Revenue Models' is held by data-team — but Maya isn't a direct member of data-team. Her actual membership is in data-team-ml, which sits as a subgroup under data-team. Access grants on a parent group do not propagate downward to subgroups by default, which is why she can't open the folder even though you correctly verified data-team has access. Two fixes: grant access on data-team-ml directly, or add Maya to data-team as a direct member.
